notes: New Format fixes to match the approved mockup exactly: top tab bar now sits above the month selector (was below it); transaction row sizing, spacing and the amount's monospace font now match precisely; date-group headers ("Tomorrow \u00b7 Thu, Jul 23") are bigger and bolder instead of small and grey.

Overview now shows a "Recent activity" heading with a View all link when New Format is on, matching the mockup \u2014 View all opens Calendar, which is where the day-by-day transaction list actually lives (the old standalone Transactions tab was retired in an earlier version; this changelog previously said New Format covered it, which was inaccurate since that screen is no longer reachable).
New Format now also applies to Calendar's day-detail transaction list and search results list, not just Overview/Upcoming/Recurring \u2014 these are the actual reachable transaction lists in the app.
